baseline.query: Order ORD-3101 arrived with damaged strawberries. Can I get a refund?

args.arg_0: Order ORD-3101 arrived with damaged strawberries. Can I get a refund?

steps.result_summary:
Refund policy v1

- Damaged grocery items reported within 24 hours are eligible for refund.
- Picnic support may approve the refund directly after checking the order.
- Additional seller-type or photo

baseline.output: Refund approved for ORD-3101. We will return EUR 8.40 to your original payment method within 3-5 business days.
